properties:
select * from 학생
insert into 학생 (student_id, student_pw, student_no, student_name, student_address, student_email, student_phone) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
insert into 교수 (professor_id, professor_name, professor_no, professor_address, professor_email, professor_phone, professor_pw) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 교수 WHERE professor_email = ?
select count(*) from 학생 where student_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 학생 WHERE student_email = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 학생 WHERE student_no = ?
SELECT student_id, student_name FROM 학생 WHERE student_id = ? AND student_pw = ?
insert into 교수 (professor_id, professor_name, professor_no, professor_address, professor_email, professor_phone, professor_pw) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
SELECT professor_id, professor_name FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ? AND professor_pw = ?
-- 학생 기능
select * from 학생
select c.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, c.class_point, pr.professor_name, c.class_capacity, (select count(*) from 수강 en where en.class_no = c.class_no) as current_count from 강의 c join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id
insert into 수강 (student_id, class_no, enroll_date) values (?, ?, now());
select en.student_id, st.student_name, en.class_no, c.class_name, c.class_time, c.class_type, c.class_room, pr.professor_name, en.enroll_date, (select count(*) from 수강 where class_no = en.class_no) as current_count, c.class_capacity, c.class_point from 수강 en join 학생 st on en.student_id = st.student_id join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no join 교수 pr on c.professor_id = pr.professor_id where en.student_id = ? order by class_no asc
delete from 수강 where student_id = ? and class_no = ?
select c.class_task, c.class_name from 강의 c join 수강 en on c.class_no = en.class_no where en.student_id = ? and c.class_no = ?
select en.score, c.class_name from 수강 en join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no where en.student_id = ? and en.class_no = ?
select c.class_name, c.class_time from 강의 c join 수강 en on c.class_no = en.class_no where en.student_id = ? and substring(c.class_time, 1, 1) = substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 1, 1) and substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 4, 1) >= (substring(c.class_time, 2, 1) and (substring(c.class_time, 4, 1)) >= substring((select class_time from 강의 where class_no = ?), 2, 1))
select c.class_name, en.score, c.class_point from 수강 en join 강의 c on en.class_no = c.class_no where student_id = ?
SELECT * FROM 강의 WHERE professor_id = ?
SELECT user_id FROM 사용자 WHERE professor_id = ?
SELECT user_id, user_name, student_id, professor_id FROM 사용자 WHERE user_id != ?
SELECT m.id, m.user_id, u.user_name, m.receiver_id, m.content FROM 메시지 m JOIN 사용자 u ON m.user_id = u.user_id WHERE (m.user_id = ? AND m.receiver_id = ?) OR (m.user_id = ? AND m.receiver_id = ?) ORDER BY m.id ASC
INSERT INTO 메시지 (user_id, receiver_id, content, id) VALUES (?, ?, ?, (SELECT new_id FROM (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 AS new_id FROM 메시지) t))
INSERT INTO 메시지 (user_id, professor_id, receiver_id, content, user_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, (SELECT professor_name FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ?))
SELECT user_id, user_name, content FROM 메시지 WHERE receiver_id = ?
DELETE FROM 강의 WHERE class_no = ?
SELECT s.student_id, s.student_name, e.score, e.status FROM 수강 e JOIN 학생 s ON e.student_id = s.student_id WHERE e.class_no = ?
UPDATE 교수 SET professor_name=?, professor_no=?, professor_address=?, professor_email=?, professor_phone=?, professor_pw=? WHERE professor_id=?
UPDATE 강의 SET class_task = ? WHERE class_no = ? AND professor_id = ?
UPDATE 수강 SET score = ? WHERE class_no = ? AND student_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM 강의 WHERE class_time = ? AND class_room = ?
SELECT class_no FROM 강의 ORDER BY class_no DESC LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO 강의 (class_no, class_name, class_point, class_time, class_room, class_type, professor_id, class_task, class_capacity) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
select student_name as NAME, student_id as ID, '학생' as TYPE -- 모든 행의 type 컬럼에 '학생' 구분 추가 from 학생 union all select professor_name as NAME, professor_id as ID, '교수' as TYPE from 교수
select * from 학생 where student_id = ?
update 학생 set student_name = ?, student_address = ?, student_email = ?, student_phone = ?, student_pw = ? where student_id = ?
INSERT IGNORE INTO 사용자 (user_id, user_name) SELECT ?, IFNULL( (SELECT student_name FROM 학생 WHERE student_id = ?), IFNULL((SELECT professor_name FROM 교수 WHERE professor_id = ?), '미등록사용자') )
INSERT INTO 메시지 (user_id, receiver_id, content) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
select m.user_id, u.user_name, m.content, m.receiver_id from 메시지 m join 사용자 u on m.user_id = u.user_id where m.receiver_id = ? OR m.user_id = ? -- 👈 나에게 온 것과 내가 보낸 것 모두 조회 order by m.id ASC
select m.user_id, m.content, m.receiver_id, m.id, u.user_name from 메시지 m join 사용자 u on m.user_id = u.user_id where (m.user_id = ? and m.receiver_id = ?) or (m.user_id = ? and m.receiver_id = ?) order by m.id ASC
UPDATE 강의 SET class_name = ?, class_point = ?, class_time = ?, class_room = ?, class_capacity = ? WHERE class_no = ? AND professor_id = ?
